hero_desc.zh: 专注高品质工业产品出口，服务全球50+国家与地区，提供从采购到交付的一站式供应链解决方案。
hero_desc.en: Premium industrial product exports to 50+ countries. One-stop supply chain solutions from sourcing to delivery.

hero_feat1_desc.zh: 深耕外贸领域，积累丰富的国际供应链管理经验
hero_feat1_desc.en: Deep expertise in international trade and supply chain management

hero_feat2_desc.zh: 产品远销欧美、东南亚、中东、非洲等全球市场
hero_feat2_desc.en: Products exported to Europe, Americas, Southeast Asia, Middle East, and Africa

hero_feat3_desc.zh: 严格的质量管控体系，通过ISO 9001等国际认证
hero_feat3_desc.en: Rigorous quality control system with ISO 9001 and international certifications

section_products_desc.zh: 覆盖多个工业领域，严格品控，支持OEM/ODM定制
section_products_desc.en: Covering multiple industrial sectors with strict quality control, OEM/ODM available

adv_title.zh: 为什么全球客户选择我们

adv1_desc.zh: 严格遵循ISO 9001质量管理体系，每批次产品均经过多重检测，确保符合国际标准
adv1_desc.en: Strict ISO 9001 quality management, multiple inspections per batch to meet international standards

adv2_desc.zh: 自有工厂直供，减少中间环节，在保证品质的前提下提供最具竞争力的价格
adv2_desc.en: Factory-direct supply chain eliminates middlemen, delivering the most competitive prices without compromising quality

adv3_desc.zh: 现代化仓储物流体系，与多家国际物流巨头合作，确保准时交付全球各地
adv3_desc.en: Modern logistics system partnered with top international carriers ensures on-time global delivery

adv4_desc.zh: 提供7×24小时多语言客服，从选型、下单到售后全程一对一专业跟进
adv4_desc.en: 24/7 multilingual customer support, one-on-one service from selection to after-sales

about_title.zh: 全球工业品供应链专家

about_text1.zh: WaterbearIntl成立于2008年，总部位于中国制造业核心区域，是一家专业的工业产品出口贸易公司。我们致力于为全球客户提供高质量的中国制造工业产品。
about_text1.en: Founded in 2008 and headquartered in China's manufacturing heartland, WaterbearIntl is a professional industrial products export company. We are dedicated to delivering high-quality Chinese-manufactured industrial products to customers worldwide.

about_text2.zh: 公司拥有超过5000平方米的仓储设施，与国内外200多家优质供应商建立了长期战略合作关系，年出口额突破2亿美元。我们的团队由经验丰富的国际贸易专家、技术工程师和多语种客服人员组成。
about_text2.en: With over 5,000 sqm of warehouse facilities and strategic partnerships with 200+ premium suppliers, our annual exports exceed $200 million. Our team consists of experienced international trade specialists, technical engineers, and multilingual support staff.

srv_desc.zh: 从产品采购到最终交付，我们提供全链路服务
srv_desc.en: From sourcing to final delivery, we handle the entire supply chain

srv1_desc.zh: 根据客户需求精准匹配供应商，提供供应商审核、样品确认、价格谈判等全流程采购代理服务
srv1_desc.en: Precise supplier matching, factory audits, sample verification, and price negotiation — full procurement agency service

srv2_desc.zh: 严格的QC流程，包括原材料检验、生产过程抽检、出货前全检，可提供第三方检测报告
srv2_desc.en: Rigorous QC process covering raw material inspection, in-process checks, and pre-shipment inspection with third-party reports

srv3_desc.zh: 提供海运、空运、铁路运输等多种物流方案，专业团队处理进出口报关，确保货物顺利通关
srv3_desc.en: Sea, air, and rail freight options with professional customs clearance to ensure smooth delivery

srv4_desc.zh: 支持来图来样定制，工程团队全程参与研发设计，保护客户知识产权，确保定制产品品质
srv4_desc.en: Custom design and manufacturing with full engineering support, IP protection, and guaranteed quality

srv5_desc.zh: 提供完善的售后服务体系，包括安装指导、技术培训、配件供应、远程支持等全方位保障
srv5_desc.en: Complete after-sales including installation guidance, training, spare parts supply, and remote assistance

srv6_desc.zh: 为海外客户提供中国市场的产品趋势分析、价格走势预测、行业政策解读等专业咨询服务
srv6_desc.en: Product trend analysis, price forecasting, and industry policy insights for the Chinese market

blog_desc.zh: 了解外贸行业最新趋势和公司发展动态
blog_desc.en: Stay informed on the latest trends in global trade

contact_desc.zh: 如需产品询价、技术咨询或业务合作，请填写以下表单
contact_desc.en: For product inquiries, technical consultation, or business collaboration

form_success.zh: 询盘提交成功！我们将在24小时内与您联系。
form_success.en: Inquiry submitted successfully! We will contact you within 24 hours.

contact_address.en: 15F, Block B, International Business Center, Yinzhou District, Ningbo, Zhejiang, China

cta_desc.zh: 如需产品询价、技术咨询或业务合作
cta_desc.en: For product inquiries, technical consultation, or business collaboration

footer_brand_desc.zh: 专业工业产品出口公司，为全球客户提供优质中国制造产品和一站式采购解决方案。
footer_brand_desc.en: Professional industrial products export company, delivering premium Chinese-manufactured products and one-stop procurement solutions worldwide.
